default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the "Evolution Summit 01" launch plan.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Davidson created a new daily calendar to replace a confusing file from Diego, clarifying all launch tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Willian will manage WhatsApp/Discord notifications, while Davidson handles Email/LinkedIn.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [**Critical Tactic:** Notify the "Evolution Summit 01" group 15 mins early to reward members with exclusive access.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [The summit runs April 14–16; daily notifications will continue throughout.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)

## Topics

### New Launch Calendar

  - [Davidson created a new daily calendar to replace a confusing file from Diego, clarifying all launch tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [The calendar details daily content (e.g., feed video, story) and notification channels (Email, WhatsApp, Discord).](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [The first batch of notifications is scheduled for today by 11 AM.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)

### Role & Channel Assignments

  - [**Willian:** Manage notifications for WhatsApp and Discord.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [**Davidson:** Manage Email and LinkedIn.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This split is a temporary workaround until a shared platform is ready.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)

### Exclusive Notification Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Reward the "Evolution Summit 01" group with exclusive access.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
    1.  [Notify the group 15 minutes before public release.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
    2.  [Release the notification to all other channels.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [**Start Date:** This strategy begins tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)

### Summit Logistics

  - [**Dates:** April 14, 15, 16.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [**Daily Notifications:** Continue throughout the summit.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [**Sign-up Flow:** Registration link → "Evolution Summit 01" WhatsApp group.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Davidson:**](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
      - [Send the registration link to Willian.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
      - [Upload the new calendar to a web panel for shared access.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
      - [Schedule all email campaigns for the week.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [**Willian:**](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
      - [Begin WhatsApp/Discord notifications today by 11 AM.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
      - [Implement the 15-minute exclusive notification strategy starting tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/_m-V6urK7kS7HDd8HrxRtzBtUf3Z2F5y?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)

action_items.description: Send WhatsApp/Discord notifications for Evolution Summit 01 per schedule
Send Evolution Summit 01 registration link to Willian
Upload web panel; grant Willian access
Coordinate WhatsApp/Discord notifications w/ Davidson's emails
Schedule week's emails for Evolution Summit 01
Implement 15-min group-first exclusivity for notifications starting Apr 7
Send Evolution Summit 01 image to Willian
